title: Verisk (VRSK) to Report Q1 Earnings: What's in the Offing?
text: Verisk's (VRSK) first-quarter 2022 earnings are likely to have benefited from organic growth within the business, lower interest expenses, lower effective tax rate, and a lower average share count.

title: Verisk Named One of UK's Best Workplaces™ and Best Workplaces for Wellbeing™ by Great Place to Work®
text: LONDON, April 28, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Leading global data analytics provider Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK) has been recognised as one of the UK's Best Workplaces™ and UK's Best Workplaces™ for Wellbeing by Great Place to Work®, the global authority on workplace culture. Based on employee feedback, each recognition honours Verisk for creating an environment of trust, pride and camaraderie.

title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) Earnings Expected to Grow: What to Know Ahead of Next Week's Release
text: Verisk (VRSK) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Verisk Publishes 2021 Corporate Social Responsibility Report
text: Jersey City, N.J., April 26, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, has published its annual Corporate Social Responsibility Report . The 2021 report illustrates how Verisk and its team members help customers around the globe better understand issues, such as climate change, and make informed decisions around resilience and sustainability, and how that work strengthens communities.

title: Wood Mackenzie scales renewable markets data reach as Canadian Solar joins Lens Power Development Partner Program

title: TransUnion (TRU) Snaps Up Verisk Financial Services For $515M
text: The acquired assets are expected to help TransUnion (TRU) offer enhanced insights and solutions that should help raise financial inclusion, as well as improve fraud prevention and risk management.

title: Verisk Brings Health Risk Rating Tool to China with AXA Life & Health Reinsurance
text: AXA Tianping uses Verisk's Health Risk Rating Tool to assess risks posed by pre-existing medical conditions AXA Tianping uses Verisk's Health Risk Rating Tool to assess risks posed by pre-existing medical conditions

title: Verisk to Announce Fiscal First-Quarter 2022 Results on May 3, 2022
text: JERSEY CITY, N.J., April 05, 2022 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Verisk (Nasdaq: VRSK), a leading global data analytics provider, will report its financial results for the fiscal first quarter ended March 31, 2022, on Tuesday, May 3, 2022, after the market close. The press release, with accompanying financial information, will be posted on the Verisk investor website at http://investor.verisk.com.

title: Life Insurers Can Accelerate Past-Due Child Support Payments with Verisk Data
